hits.snippet: # Pre-registration Protocol  ## Scope - Study: Plasmid Priority retrospective genomic surveillance ranking. - Frozen evaluation surfaces: temporal holdout, source holdout, spatial holdout. - Primary endpoint: `spread_label` operational utility under governance constraints.  ## Hypotheses 1. Governance-approved official model preserves ranking utility under holdout shifts. 2. Calibration and uncert
hits.title: Pre-registration Protocol
